subject: App keeps bouncing me back to login on iPhone
body: On my iPhone in Safari I sign in, finish 2FA, and then land back on the login screen again.

subject: CSV export downloads blank file
body: Export to CSV completes but the downloaded file only has headers and no rows.

subject: Mobile login loops after verification code
body: After I enter the texted verification code on mobile Safari, the page flashes and sends me back to sign in.

subject: CSV export is missing customer names
body: The CSV file downloads, but several columns including customer name are empty even though they appear in the web table.

subject: iOS login keeps kicking me out
body: I can log in from my laptop, but on iOS Safari I get kicked out immediately after the home page appears.

subject: CSV export cuts off after 200 rows
body: Our report should have around 800 rows, but the downloaded CSV stops at 200 every time.
